items.title: [正面] Very fun game if you like Slay the Spire or other...
items.summary: Very fun game if you like Slay the Spire or other deckbuilder rogue likes you'll definitely love this. Don't be put of by the gacha because the game basically throws pull currency at you

items.title: [正面] I don’t care about the convoluted story, but the c...
items.summary: I don’t care about the convoluted story, but the card play is fun and engaging. The game offers a lot of content for low spenders, so you don’t have to break the bank. In fact, just throwing money at it won’t let you power through; you need to put your head into it anyway.

items.title: [负面] Установил, запускаешь игру, выбираешь язык и ждёшь...
items.summary: Установил, запускаешь игру, выбираешь язык и ждёшь пока скачаются 2 ГБ языкового пакета, потом подтверждаешь пользовательское соглашение полностью на китайском языке, а после попадаешь в мир азиатской новеллы с элементами пошагового, тактического боя. Игра пестрит феминизмом как в SteamWorld Quest:

items.title: [正面] Most games wish they could write half as good, it...
items.summary: Most games wish they could write half as good, it used to be held back by the translation but the community came together to fix most of the main campaign. items.title:
[负面] 手游里面gameplay还行，少见。美术有一定风格化，不错。

好了，见过16张卡叠++++++++...
items.summary:
手游里面gameplay还行，少见。美术有一定风格化，不错。

好了，见过16张卡叠++++++++关键机制+++++++++的二游么，这个就是。而且还不算专武。按照一般游戏的重要性，专武也是要叠的，虽然没有16命这么核心。所以造一张卡C所有玩法需要16+16。32张。
这游戏一开始还是3叠4张完全体的。唯独骗氪这一块实装迅速。

你游以前还是有点值得玩的点的，16尸块光速落地属于是太自信了，不想想自己配不配

items.title: [负面] Morimens has fantastic visuals, sounds, and storyl...
items.summary:
Morimens has fantastic visuals, sounds, and storylines but it's tied to an awful monetization model which keeps getting worse.

As a big spender in this game (hundreds in the last 3 months, those FOMO packs are dangerous) I can't in good faith recommend Morimens. Which hurts and is embarrassing, as

items.title: [负面] Its a shame what they are doing to this game, the ...
items.summary:
Its a shame what they are doing to this game, the new "Ethereal Cores" are basically ruining a perfectly normal system.
Listen, the game is fun, and I want the devs to succeed and get that bag as well, but this is not it.
it does seem they are taking feedback seriously though, so i hope that they can change this in the future.
